message:
feat(daemon): add background embedding job infrastructure

Implement a background worker system for processing embedding jobs
asynchronously within the cass daemon, enabling non-blocking semantic
indexing operations.

Core components added:

src/daemon/worker.rs (new):
- EmbeddingWorker: dedicated thread for processing embedding jobs
- EmbeddingWorkerHandle: thread-safe handle for submitting jobs
- WorkerMessage enum: Submit, Cancel, Shutdown message types
- EmbeddingJobConfig: configuration struct for job parameters
- Sync channel-based communication (adapted from xf's async pattern)

src/daemon/core.rs:
- Initialize worker thread on daemon startup
- Add worker_handle field to ModelDaemon struct
- Handle SubmitEmbeddingJob request → delegate to worker
- Handle EmbeddingJobStatus request → query sqlite job table
- Handle CancelEmbeddingJob request → update job status + signal
- Clean shutdown of worker thread on daemon termination

src/daemon/client.rs:
- submit_embedding_job(): submit job via UDS protocol
- embedding_job_status(): query job progress for a db_path
- cancel_embedding_job(): cancel pending/running jobs

src/daemon/protocol.rs:
- Add Request variants: SubmitEmbeddingJob, EmbeddingJobStatus,
  CancelEmbeddingJob
- Add Response variants: JobSubmitted, JobStatus, JobCancelled
- Add EmbeddingJobInfo and EmbeddingJobDetail structs

src/storage/sqlite.rs:
- Bump SCHEMA_VERSION to 9
- Add MIGRATION_V9: embedding_jobs table with status tracking
- Add EmbeddingJobRow struct for query results
- upsert_embedding_job(): create or replace jobs
- start_embedding_job(): mark job as running
- complete_embedding_job(): mark job as completed
- fail_embedding_job(): mark job as failed with error
- cancel_embedding_jobs(): cancel by db_path and optional model_id
- update_job_progress(): update completed_docs count
- get_embedding_jobs(): list all jobs for a db_path

src/lib.rs:
- Minor formatting cleanup in run_doctor function

This enables cass to offload expensive embedding generation to a
background thread while the daemon remains responsive to search
queries, following the pattern successfully used in xf.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -51,6 +51,24 @@ pub enum Request {
     /// Get daemon status and loaded models.
     Status,
 
+    /// Submit a background embedding job.
+    SubmitEmbeddingJob {
+        db_path: String,
+        index_path: String,
+        two_tier: bool,
+        fast_model: Option<String>,
+        quality_model: Option<String>,
+    },
+
+    /// Query embedding job status.
+    EmbeddingJobStatus { db_path: String },
+
+    /// Cancel embedding jobs.
+    CancelEmbeddingJob {
+        db_path: String,
+        model_id: Option<String>,
+    },
+
     /// Request graceful shutdown.
     Shutdown,
 }
@@ -70,6 +88,15 @@ pub enum Response {
     /// Status response with daemon info.
     Status(StatusResponse),
 
+    /// Embedding job submitted.
+    JobSubmitted { job_id: String, message: String },
+
+    /// Embedding job status.
+    JobStatus(EmbeddingJobInfo),
+
+    /// Embedding jobs cancelled.
+    JobCancelled { cancelled: usize, message: String },
+
     /// Shutdown acknowledgement.
     Shutdown { message: String },
 
@@ -176,6 +203,23 @@ pub enum ErrorCode {
     VersionMismatch,
 }
 
+/// Status information for embedding jobs.
+#[derive(Debug, Clone, Serialize, Deserialize)]
+pub struct EmbeddingJobInfo {
+    pub jobs: Vec<EmbeddingJobDetail>,
+}
+
+/// Detail for a single embedding job.
+#[derive(Debug, Clone, Serialize, Deserialize)]
+pub struct EmbeddingJobDetail {
+    pub job_id: i64,
+    pub model_id: String,
+    pub status: String,
+    pub total_docs: i64,
+    pub completed_docs: i64,
+    pub error_message: Option<String>,
+}
+
 /// Framed message wrapper for length-prefixed protocol.
 #[derive(Debug, Clone, Serialize, Deserialize)]
 pub struct FramedMessage<T> {
